title: Implement Enhanced Debugging and Observability in Simulation Infrastructure
description: Implement Enhanced Debugging and Observability in Simulation Infrastructure - Implement the enhanced debugging, logging, and observability features designed for LICHEN simulation infrastructure. This includes: rich contextual logging with node states, system metrics, and transaction tracking; debug mode controls with zero performance overhead; fail-fast mechanisms for immediate problem detection; and detailed system state monitoring for fast debug, fix, retry cycles. This work supports the broader Epic: Complete Simulation Infrastructure Enhancement Epic.
close_reason: Enhanced logging, metrics, state monitoring, fail-fast checks, Renode/Zephyr tool integration and tests implemented. All tests passing.
